message.content: Stage 5 complete ✅ — Verdict: **PROCEED_TO_PNR**, rework_target: NONE. 97/97 checklist items PASS. Advancing to Stage 6.

function.name: delegate_to_agent

acceptance_criteria: PnR execution evidence must exist (logs or report)
PnR report must be written to docs/pnr_report.md
Timing and DRC/LVS results must be documented
inputs.context: This is a derivative of the TI MSPM33C321A. RISC-V Hazard3 core, 512KB flash, 128KB SRAM (32x CF_SRAM_1024x32 macros), LQFP-64 padframe (4700x4200um die), 80MHz clock. Design cleared for PnR by verification review (PROCEED_TO_PNR verdict). Open items to track: ADC mixed-signal verification at physical integration signoff; GLS post-synthesis.
inputs.task: Execute hierarchical Place-and-Route for the mspm33c321a_derivative_mcu design using nc_chipgen's pre-generated OpenLane config, harden the wrapper macro, then run top-level chip PnR integrating the wrapper with the padframe GDS.
